tactical_shape: all-action, open contest with plenty of openings
attacked directly and surged from deep
standout_players: Mehdi Taremi — hit the post after a surging run from inside his own half
Ramin Rezaeian — 36-year-old rewarded for his forward burst with an equaliser
Saman Ghoddos — first-time pass to Moghanloo described as sumptuous
Shahriar Moghanloo — made a goal-saving block and was involved in the equaliser
home_read.momentum: Despite a chaotic buildup, Iran twice came from behind to draw and emerged with a positive, spirited performance in a politically charged opener.

tactical_shape: used long kick downfield as a route into attack
combined well through Wood and Eli Just in a loose, open game
standout_players: Eli Just — scored a double and looked sharp throughout
Chris Wood — linked play well and repeatedly combined with Just
Max Crocombe — his long kick downfield began the move for the opener
away_read.momentum: New Zealand showed enough to suggest they can surprise people, but letting two leads slip leaves them with a strong sense of 'what if?'
